description: Author the write-scope matcher proof harness: the full 27-row IsInScope truth table (data-driven, pinned verbatim) plus the TWO seeded fuzz properties (membership-implies-overlap AND Overlaps-completeness/no-false-negatives) - encoding the §2.1/§2.2 spec before WriteScope.cs exists, and proven to FAIL against a deliberately-naive permissive matcher first
